codeReview.summary: ProductList component implementation fully satisfies all feature requirements. It displays products as cards in a responsive grid (1/2/3/4 columns), shows name, price, category, condition, and image for each product. Edit functionality opens ProductForm in a Dialog modal pre-filled with product data. Delete functionality shows a confirmation dialog before removal. Component accepts products array prop with ProductListItem interface, onEdit and onDelete callbacks, and isLoading state. Quality checks passed (TypeScript, Biome lint, 366 tests).

issues.description: Price formatting uses `Number(product.price).toFixed(2)` which would produce 'NaN' if price is undefined or non-numeric. However, ProductListItem interface defines price as `number | string` and data originates from backend with proper validation, so this is a theoretical edge case rather than a practical concern.

summary: Review passed. ProductList component correctly implements all 4 expected behaviors: (1) displays all products from prop, (2) shows name/price/category/condition for each product, (3) edit button opens pre-filled ProductForm modal, (4) delete button shows confirmation dialog. Component follows documented conventions for Tailwind CSS, Dialog/Card components, and Lucide icons. Skill procedure was followed correctly. No blocking issues found.
